basic_details.job_title: ICMR NITVAR Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR)
basic_details.short_information: ICMR-National Institute of Translational Virology and AIDS Research (ICMR NITVAR) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 2 Project Research Scientist I (Medical) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ICMR NITVAR office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per ICMR guidelines
